title: Events Intern
description:
• Great Working Environment With Family-like Culture
  • Great Exposure and Learning
  • Great Mentorship and Dynamic Team
  • Events Facilitation and Client Interaction
  • Events Set Up, Tear Down
  • Manage Event Logistics and Operations
  • Maintenance of Equipment and Logistics
  • Customer Feedback
  • Games Development

Requirements

  • Minimum of 3 months commitment
  • Strong verbal communication skills and love speaking to crowds
  • Outgoing, people-oriented, positive attitude, and great customer service
  • Comfortable with physically demanding job scope; sporty
  • Proficient with basic digital tools (e.g. Google Suites, Zoom, Google Meets, etc)
  • No prior experience is required
  • Class 3/3A driver’s license (not required but preferred)
  • Students and Fresh Graduates are all welcome to apply

Benefits

  • Competitive salary and benefits: SGD 800 to SGD 1000 / month (depending on experience and qualifications)
  • Great learning opportunities
  • Supportive and fun working environment with a nurturing culture
  • Training and mentorship are provided
  • International and collaborative team
  • Work in a fast-growing company and deliver real-world impact
  • Regular team bonding gatherings, outings, and year-end parties to have fun with each other
  • Snacks, coffee, and drinks, in the office

postedCompany.description:
FunEmpire® creates the world’s best group experiences for team building, celebrations and gatherings. Our mission is to bring people together through fun.

We have successfully organized more than 50,000 events for over 1 million happy clients. Our award-winning group activities have received more than 8,000+ 5-Star Reviews, and have been featured in over 200+ media outlets across television, newspapers, radio, magazines and digital platforms (e.g. Forbes, Yahoo! Finance, Entrepreneur, Channel News Asia, Timeout, Business Insider, etc).

Our diverse range of unique and fun group activities include Laser Tag, Combat Archery Tag, Bubble Bump™, Poolball™, Saber Tag®, SaberFit®, Art Jamming, Art Heist™, Terrarium Workshop, Leather Workshop, Candle Making Workshop, Clay Making Workshop and many more.

We work with a diverse clientele ranging from multinational corporations, small-medium enterprises, government agencies, universities, schools and consumers. Our clients include Google, Facebook, Apple, Disney, Netflix, Amazon, JP Morgan, Citibank, Goldman Sachs, McKinsey & Company, BCG, Bain, US Department of Commerce, ByteDance, Alibaba, Tencent, Singapore's Prime Minister's Office, National University of Singapore, Singapore Management University, and many more.

FunEmpire® has also received multiple awards such as Forbes 30 Under 30 Asia Honoree 2019, Brands For Good Champion 2019, Tripadvisor Traveller’s Choice Award 2021, Spirit Of Enterprise Winner 2018 and many more.

We are growing really fast - come join us and let's build an iconic brand together!

For more information, please visit www.funempire.com
postedCompany.name: THE FUN EMPIRE PTE. LTD.
